tools.name: ctx_sys_disk
tools.description: Show disk usage across all mounted filesystems.

tools.name: ctx_sys_mem
tools.description: Show memory usage (supports Linux free -h and macOS vm_stat fallback).
tools.command: free -h 2>/dev/null || { echo '--- macOS Memory ---'; vm_stat | head -10; sysctl -n hw.memsize | awk '{printf "Total: %.1f GB\n", $1/1073741824}'; }

tools.name: ctx_sys_top
tools.description: Show top 20 processes sorted by CPU usage.
tools.command: ps aux --sort=-%cpu 2>/dev/null | head -20 || ps aux -r | head -20

tools.name: ctx_sys_ports
tools.description: Show listening TCP ports and associated processes.

tools.name: ctx_sys_network
tools.description: Show network interface addresses and configuration.
